title: Kayla's Bottles
description: Retextures bottles to look more unique to eachother
body:
Retextures bottles to look more unique, and more specifically, fit in line with the shape that Ominous Bottles have.

This mod has compatibility for a few mods already:
- Atmospheric (Aloe Gel)
- Autumnity (Sap & Syrup)
- Farmer's Delight (Milk)
- Neapolitan (Milk.. again)
- No Man's Land (Maple Syrup, Pesto & Resin Oil)
- Quark (Clouds)
- Spelunkery (Dimensional Tears)
- Supplementaries (Lumisene)
- Upgrade Aquatic (Mulberry Jam)


If there's a mod I could make compatible (avoiding something like Farmer's Delight's teacups), please let me know! I'm available on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/kaylathebee.bsky.social) as well as [Raspberry Flavoured's Discord server](https://discord.gg/jxNe26WNYh)
